tender.description: Installation of RCC U- drain at New Rohtak Road (Ramswaroop Vidyarthi Marg to Zakhira flyover underpass) and Gali No.10 (New Rohtak Road to Ramjas School) under Sub-Division-II of SRD Project Division-II, PWD during 2025-26. Recall of Tender
